name: JACOBS SOLUTIONS INC.
business: Jacobs Solutions Inc. provides end-to-end solutions across advanced manufacturing, cities & places, energy, environmental, life sciences, transportation, and water. Its services span advisory and consulting, feasibility and planning, design, program delivery, and lifecycle management. The company serves national, state, and local government clients across multiple regions including the U.S., Europe, U.K., Middle East, and Asia Pacific, as well as multinational and local private sector organizations globally.
sellsTo: National, state, and local governments (U.S., Europe, U.K., Middle East, Asia Pacific)
Multinational and local private sector organizations globally
Public sector clients (e.g., UK Ministry of Defence, National Highways)
Private sector clients (e.g., Diageo, Microsoft, Pret A Manger, Unilever)

exposures.sentence: Our capabilities in data analytics, digital architecture, advisory and transformation, software development and cybersecurity enable clients to unlock the full value of their data and digital infrastructure to improve performance, resilience and sustainability.

Through the expertise of our people and ongoing investment in artificial intelligence (AI) and next-generation digital solutions, we empower our clients' decision-making across the entire asset lifecycle from capital planning and operations to cybersecurity and operational technology.

We deliver cross-cutting solutions across seven interconnected capabilities: decarbonization & greenhouse gas management; adaptation & resilience; sustainable built environments; sustainable business; social value; nature positive; and energy transition.

Our capabilities in data analytics, digital architecture, advisory and transformation, software development and cybersecurity enable clients to unlock the full value of their data and digital infrastructure to improve performance, resilience and sustainability.

catalysts.event: Launch of Challenge Accepted growth strategy
catalysts.sentence: In February 2025, we launched Challenge Accepted , our multi-year growth strategy designed to sharpen our focus and accelerate our performance.

catalysts.event: Launch of Evolve tool for sustainability recommendations
catalysts.sentence: In fiscal 2025, we launched our Evolve tool, which generates recommendations to integrate sustainability into our projects to enhance their positive impact and resilience.

catalysts.event: Launch of Jacobs AI Assist proprietary AI tool
catalysts.sentence: In fiscal 2025, we launched Jacobs AI Assist, our proprietary AI tool that makes our authoritative knowledge more discoverable and usable for our employees in their daily work.

catalysts.event: Potential exercisability of PA Consulting redemption options
catalysts.sentence: The optional redemption features may become exercisable no earlier than five years from the March 2, 2021 closing date, or upon the occurrence of certain other events.
